name: Full Stack Dev Container
postCreateCommand:
chmod 700 /root/.ssh && chmod 600 /root/.ssh/id_ed25519 && chmod 644 /root/.ssh/id_ed25519.pub && ssh-keyscan github.com >> /root/.ssh/known_hosts && printf 'Host github.com
HostName github.com
User git
IdentityFile ~/.ssh/id_ed25519
IdentitiesOnly yes
' > /root/.ssh/config && chmod 600 /root/.ssh/config
